title: JWTClaim
description: ES256 JWT claims shape. Mirrors loa-freeside/apps/gateway issuance shape (see loa-freeside/packages/adapters/agent/jwt-service.ts:142-200). The Rust gateway is the canonical signer per CLAUDE.md royal decree; this schema is the cross-language contract that both gateway (Rust) and consumers (TS) honor. Per SDD §11.1 Lock-8: V1 ships single keypair operator-rotated; jti denylist is V2. Per SDD §11.4 + I6 invariant: every consumer MUST assert claims.tenant === expected_tenant before authorizing.

sub.description: Tenant-scoped canonical user_id (e.g., midi_profiles.id for mibera). Matches User.sub.

tenant.description: Tenant slug (mibera·cubquest·apdao·...). I6 invariant: every consumer MUST assert claims.tenant === expected_tenant for the request context.

wallets.description: User's bound wallets. Multi-chain (e.g., cubquest = EVM + Solana). Empty for anon-tier sessions.

tier.description: Access tier per loa-freeside gateway tier model. Slice-B uses public/verified primarily.

display_name.description: Cached IdentityComponent.handle for chat-medium presentation. CMP-boundary safe (handle, NOT raw ID).

discord_id.description: Cached Discord snowflake for bot session correlation.

iss.description: Issuer. loa-freeside/apps/gateway issues with `arrakis` in v1; freeside-auth-orchestrated mints set this per gateway config.

aud.description: Audience. Tenant-bound (e.g., `mibera`, `cubquest`) — not generic `loa-finn`. Slice-B uses tenant-bound audience for I6 enforcement.

jti.description: JWT ID (UUIDv4). Reserved for V2 jti denylist per SDD §11.5 D-H.

v.description: JWT schema version (per Bridgebuilder F-10 in loa-freeside).

nft_id.description: Bound NFT/Mibera token ID. Optional; legacy slot from gateway shape.

pool_id.description: Reserved · loa-freeside execution-context pool routing. Slice-B does not populate.

byok.description: Reserved · BYOK flag for finn ModelRunner. Slice-B does not populate.

req_hash.description: Reserved · request body hash for replay protection at finn. Slice-B does not populate.
